title: CMOS Memory Cell — VLSI Physical Design
description: Engineered a CMOS 4-bit memory cell in Cadence Virtuoso (schematic + custom layout), achieving top-ranked area efficiency in class. Ran DRC/LVS and validated timing with Spectre and HSPICE.

title: Ethernet Network Switch — VLSI Physical Design
description: Designed a fully functional Ethernet network switch in Verilog with MAC address learning and multi-port packet forwarding logic. Took the design through the full VLSI flow — synthesis, place & route, and physical verification — producing a final GDSII chip layout output.

title: ARM-Based ISA RTL Implementation
description: Implementing the LC-3b ISA in Verilog for FPGA with out-of-order pipelined execution and virtually indexed cache. Debugging via Basys3 seven-segment display and switches.

title: Longhorn Racing Solar — Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Designed voltage, temperature, and hall-effect current monitoring PCBs for a battery protection system in KiCad. Migrated to a system-on-module interrupt-based architecture.

title: Synthetic Traffic Generation
description: Agent-based model generating synthetic city populations and road networks in MATSIM format based on configurable zoning parameters.
